title: BLOCK 1 FINAL: Foundation test
description: Teen Block 1 final — full alphabet + numbers + basic punctuation at 40 WPM
text: Hey Sam! Are you free at 3 today? We're meeting at the cafe near school to plan the weekend trip. Bring snacks, your headphones, and 10 dollars. Don't be late!
tips: 🎓 First milestone! 40 WPM = solid teen foundation
From here, Block 2 builds speed and adds more punctuation
If you missed by a few WPM, retry — accuracy first, speed second

character_tips.anna: 🎯 Teen Block 1 done! 40 WPM = strong start. Block 2 builds from here.
character_tips.maxim: Foundation cleared. From here, every block is application + speed.
character_tips.klavochka: First triumph, my hero! 🎉 Onto bigger adventures!
